use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages creating an immersive starfield atmosphere
Ambient decorative background for SaaS applications and tech-focused websites
Loading states and empty state backgrounds with animated visual interest
Space-themed or night-mode interfaces requiring animated background effects
ai_summary: An animated canvas-based starfield component that renders a customizable night sky with twinkling stars. Supports transparency mode, adjustable color hue, brightness, star density (up to 1200 stars), and animation speed. Uses radial gradients to create soft glowing star effects with HSL color theming. Perfect for hero sections, landing pages, or ambient backgrounds in tech and space-themed applications.
